pages.title: Heart of the stitch
pages.text: Spawn egg sewing macros orbit the $(rev)Soul Heart$(warn) item — equivalent to focusing Botania terrasteel gear around a single catalyst chip.

pages.title: Soul Heart item
pages.text: Crafted via rotten surplus + ghast tears + soul jar + heart shapeless macro — identical ratios to ancient docs.

pages.title: Ingredients reminder
pages.text: 5× Rotten Flesh$(br)2× Ghast Tear$(br)Soul Jar + Heart$(br2)JEI shows slot placements exactly.
